rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 9/10 score and praise the same core strengths (TypeScript/Node/React, AI-agent infrastructure, TDD/testing). The differences in the concerns section — 'flight risk' from operating at Staff/Founder level and a 'preference for niche languages (like Dlang)' — key off the candidate's seniority and resume content, not off the geographic relocation from Berlin/Cluj/Bucharest to the United States. No score change, new concern, or shifted reasoning is tied to the location signal; the variation reads as ordinary run-to-run rewording.
